sentence: This lease shall expire on June 30, 2025, unless renewed by written agreement of both parties.

description: Lease effective date — real estate domain
sentence: The tenancy shall commence on February 1, 2024 and the tenant agrees to all terms herein.
Payment is due within 30 days of invoice date; amounts unpaid after March 15, 2025 will accrue interest.
All goods must be delivered in accordance with the specifications outlined in Exhibit A.
This policy automatically renews annually on the anniversary date unless the insured provides 60 days written notice.

description: Notice period to cancel renewal — insurance domain
sentence: To prevent automatic renewal, written cancellation notice must be received no later than 30 days prior to the renewal date.
This offer of employment is made as of January 15, 2024 and is contingent upon successful background check completion.
The employee agrees to maintain confidentiality of all proprietary information acquired during employment.
The software license granted hereunder shall terminate on December 31, 2025 unless renewed prior to that date.
All regulated entities must submit their annual compliance report by April 30, 2025 or face penalties.
